T0112.title: Successful Conversion
T0112.definition: A slang term indicating that a victim has taken the bait and is about to lose money. In fraud jargon, victims are referred to as 'fish,' and 'water' is a metaphor for money. 'Coming out of the water' signifies the moment the victim falls into the trap and their funds are about to be stolen.
